sources.title: AMD Stock Jumps As AI Data Center Sales Drive Q1 Beat — IBD
sources.snippet: EPS $1.37 on $10.25B revenue; data center $5.8B (+57% YoY).

sources.title: AMD Venice EPYC 2nm production ramp — IR press release
sources.snippet: First HPC product in production on TSMC 2nm; Verano follow-on planned.

sources.title: AMD Stock Surges on Blowout Earnings — MarketWise
sources.snippet: OpenAI 6GW and Meta multi-GW Instinct deals highlighted.

sources.title: Agentic AI doubling CPU TAM — MarketBeat
sources.snippet: Management raises CPU opportunity view on agentic orchestration workloads.
